summary: Full backend + frontend smoke testing for StudyFlow AI MVP. All 12 backend pytest cases pass (100%) including real GPT-5.2 LLM calls for chat & schedule. Frontend Expo web preview loads cleanly with no JS/page errors; Guest login → home dashboard works, tab navigation across Home/Planner/Calendar/Tutor/Profile works, dark theme is default and theme options visible in Profile.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: useNativeDriver not supported on web (Animated falls back to JS). Cosmetic only, no functional impact.
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — should migrate pointerEvents prop into style for RN 0.74+ compliance.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Replace pointerEvents prop with style.pointerEvents to silence deprecation warning.
OPTIONAL: Gate useNativeDriver behind Platform.OS !== 'web' or remove for web target to silence warning.

OPTIONAL: Resolve Expo dependency-version mismatches reported in expo.err.log (@react-native-async-storage/async-storage, expo-linear-gradient, expo-notifications, react-native-svg) to avoid future incompatibilities.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~770 lines — consider splitting into routers (auth, tasks, notes, pomodoro, prep, analytics, chat) under /app/backend/routes/ for maintainability before it grows further.

auth/me, auth/logout, and every CRUD endpoint duplicate the (authorization, session_token) header/cookie plumbing — could be consolidated into a single FastAPI dependency to remove ~30 lines of repetition.
PrepUpdate has no bounds on sat_progress/ielts_progress (0–100) — accept any int. Add Pydantic constraints (conint(ge=0, le=100)).
/auth/session sets cookie with secure=True samesite='none' — correct for production HTTPS preview; ensure local dev still works.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on smoke flows tested (login → guest → tabs → theme)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Tests use POST /api/auth/guest to create ephemeral guest users; test data prefixed with TEST_ and cleaned up via DELETE in same test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend env var is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (NOT EXPO_BACKEND_URL). Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_studyflow_api.py covers all current endpoints incl. real LLM calls — reuse it. The bottom tab labelled 'Tutor' (not 'AI Tutor') routes to chatbot screen. Theme options in Profile are 'Light/Dark/System' rows (not a single toggle button); a red dot marks current selection.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no failing test cases to root-cause.
